pilot_config.note: Pilot experiments already completed in prior iterations. All experiments used samples=100, seed=42, and completed within timeout.

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Feature steering at L4
pilot_tasks.description: Pilot steering test on subset of 5 features at L4 with strengths [1, 5, 10, 50]. Already completed. Result: no significant correlation with absorption.

pilot.pass_criteria: Steering success > random baseline AND correlation with absorption r < 0.5

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Sparse probing at L4
pilot_tasks.description: Pilot probing test on subset of 5 features at L4, k-sparse at k=5. Already completed. Result: no significant correlation with absorption.

pilot.pass_criteria: F1 > 0.5 baseline AND correlation with absorption r < 0.5

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Random SAE baseline comparison
pilot_tasks.description: Pilot H10: Create random SAE and compare absorption to trained SAE on 26 features. Already completed. Result: random SAE shows 8x higher absorption (0.278 vs 0.034, p<0.001).

pilot.pass_criteria: Random SAE absorption > trained SAE (informative if opposite)

full_experiment_summary: All full experiments already completed in iterations 1-8. No new experiments needed. Remaining work is writing and figure generation.
